key.class.wizard.tooltip.name: Wizard
key.class.wizard.tooltip.description: A spellcaster with magicks developed from a dedicated learning and understanding of the arcane.
class.wizard.name: Wizard
class.wizard.description.short: A spellcaster with magics developed from dedicated learning and mastery of the arcane.
class.wizard.description.long: The Wizard embodies magic through study - they represent the pinnacle of what can be achieved through careful study and dedicated practice of the arcane arts.
class.wizard.loadout.apprentice.name: Apprentice
class.wizard.skill.group.arcanist.name: Logikos
class.wizard.skill.group.enchanter.name: Apocrypha
class.wizard.skill.group.enchanter.descr: Occult, necrotic and enchanter magics and cool shit.
class.wizard.skill.group.metamagic.name: Metamagic
class.wizard.spells.group.level_01.name: Tier 1
class.wizard.spells.group.level_01.descr: Level 1 baby spells for little babies.
class.wizard.spells.group.level_02.name: Tier 2
class.wizard.spells.group.level_02.descr: Level 1 baby spells for little babies.
class.wizard.spells.group.level_03.name: Tier 3
class.wizard.spells.group.level_03.descr: Level 1 baby spells for little babies.
class.wizard.skill.shattering_shards.des: When your shields break they release 2 magic missiles that go boom pow bang.
class.wizard.skill.energetic_casting.des: After casting a spell, your move speed and weapon swap speed increases by x%.
class.wizard.skill.armored_casting.name: Armored Casting
class.wizard.skill.armored_casting.descr: Reduce the spell casting penalties from wearing light armor by 50/100%.
class.wizard.skill.combustion.name: Combustion
class.wizard.skill.combustion.descriptio: When you kill an enemy with a fire spell, they explode for x% of their burn as damage around them, inflicting y burn.
class.wizard.skill.arcane_circuitry.name: Arcane Circuitry
class.wizard.skill.arcane_circuitry.desc: You take no damage from your own electric spells, whenever you deal electric damage gain x% of that damage as charge, which will be released at nearby enemies.
